show running-config
config-file-header
switch572434
v1.4.11.5 / R800_NIK_1_4_220_026
CLI v1.0
set system mode router 

file SSD indicator encrypted
@
ssd-control-start
ssd config
ssd file passphrase control unrestricted
no ssd file integrity control
ssd-control-end REDACTED
!
spanning-tree pathcost method short
port jumbo-frame
bridge multicast filtering
vlan database
vlan 2,10-20
exit
voice vlan oui-table add 0001e3 Siemens_AG_phone________
voice vlan oui-table add 00036b Cisco_phone_____________
voice vlan oui-table add 00096e Avaya___________________
voice vlan oui-table add 000fe2 H3C_Aolynk______________
voice vlan oui-table add 0060b9 Philips_and_NEC_AG_phone
voice vlan oui-table add 00d01e Pingtel_phone___________
voice vlan oui-table add 00e075 Polycom/Veritel_phone___
voice vlan oui-table add 00e0bb 3Com_phone______________
bonjour interface range vlan 2,100
hostname switch572434
no logging console
no passwords complexity enable
passwords aging 0
username cisco password encrypted REDACTED privilege 15
ip ssh server
no ip http server
clock timezone " " -5
clock summer-time web recurring usa
clock source sntp
sntp unicast client enable
sntp unicast client poll
sntp server 10.66.4.1 poll
clock dhcp timezone
ip telnet server
!
interface vlan 1
 ip address 192.168.98.2 255.255.255.0
 no ip address dhcp
!

 name CONTROL
 ip address 10.66.4.3 255.255.255.0
!
